title: Croma Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Croma Holdings Services is Hiring: E-commerce Executive (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Croma Holdings Services, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a E-commerce Executive for our Bhubaneswar operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Croma Holdings Services:
Croma Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Croma Holdings Services!
